explanations.pt-br: Import re e explicacao do bug: '.' nao match newline sem DOTALL.
explanations.en-us: Import re and bug explanation: '.' doesn't match newline without DOTALL.

explanations.pt-br: Solucao 1: usar re.DOTALL flag no search.
explanations.en-us: Solution 1: use re.DOTALL flag in search.

explanations.pt-br: Solucao 2: usar [\s\S] que match tudo incluindo newline.
explanations.en-us: Solution 2: use [\s\S] which matches everything including newline.

explanations.pt-br: Solucao 3: compilar regex com flags. Teste das duas solucoes: DOTALL e [\s\S].
explanations.en-us: Solution 3: compile regex with flags. Testing both solutions: DOTALL and [\s\S].
